# Carlos Suarez | Software Engineer & GIS Portfolio

A minimalist, high-contrast monochrome digital portfolio built using Markdown and hosted natively via GitHub Pages. This repository showcases over 16 years of engineering experience across full-stack development, spatial database management, and Python-driven AI/automation workflows.

## 🛠️ Tech Stack & Architecture

*   **Static Site Generator:** Jekyll (Native GitHub Pages compilation)
*   **Design Language:** High-contrast Monochrome Minimalist / Material Design Core
*   **Interactions:** High-performance, layout-stable `IntersectionObserver` API for asynchronous text fade reveals
*   **Typography:** Google Fonts (`Kanit` for structural headlines, `Ubuntu` for clean prose body text)

---

## 📁 Repository Structure

```text
├── _config.yml               # Core Jekyll settings & theme variables
├── _layouts/                 # Global UI wireframes
│   └── default.html          # Main HTML structure, navigation, footer, & asset imports
├── _posts/                   # Technical case studies using STAR methodology
│   ├── 2026-06-01-gis-spatial-data-pipelines.md
│   └── 2026-06-01-pivot-to-backend-architecture.md
├── assets/
│   ├── css/
│   │   └── style.css         # Custom typographic scaling & micro-interaction transitions
│   └── js/
│       └── script.js         # Mobile navigation & non-blocking layout reveal scripts
├── index.md                  # Main landing content & core capabilities routing
└── who-i-am.md               # Executive professional bio
